sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Supplementary Appropriation Short title
(1) On the authority of a warrant issued by the President, Supplementary
sections.text:
Appropriation
there may be expended from the general revenues of the Republic
such monies indicated in respect of the services of the Republic
specified in the third column of the First and Second Schedules
being expenditure in excess of the monies appropriated for the
services of the Republic during the financial year ending on 31st
December, 2016.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka. Price K12.00
